rule_metadata.name: Zombie_Malformed_ZIP
rule_metadata.description: Malformed ZIP with header declaring method STORED while having DEFLATE-compressed payload
rule_metadata.author: marcin@ulikowski.pl

rules.rule_text:
rule Zombie_Malformed_ZIP
{
	meta:
		description = "Malformed ZIP with header declaring method STORED while having DEFLATE-compressed payload"
		author = "marcin@ulikowski.pl"
		date = "2026-03-15"
		modified = "2026-03-18"
		hash1 = "7316a4c3cd1cf183925ab4b7e77dbf52b38180ee1faf0156d7ea410f42cb5e76"
		reference = "https://github.com/bombadil-systems/zombie-zip"

	strings:
		$local = {
			50 4b 03 04 // LFH signature
			?? 00 // minimum version
			?? 00 // flags
			00 00 // compression method = STORED (no compression)
			?? ?? // last modification time
			?? ?? // last modification date
			?? ?? ?? ?? // CRC-32
			?? ?? ?? ?? // compressed size
			?? ?? ?? ?? // uncompressed size
			}

	condition:
		$local at 0 and ( uint32( 18 ) != uint32( 22 ) ) and ( uint8( 6 ) & 0x41 ) == 0
}
